narration: Gas Station begins with a total check: if total gas is less than total cost, the trip is impossible.
callout: Impossible overall means no starting station can work.

narration: While scanning, greedy keeps a running tank from the current start.
decision: If the tank becomes negative, reset the start to the next station.

predictionPrompt.prompt: What should happen when the running tank becomes negative?

choices.label: Reset the start to the next station
choices.feedback: Correct. The current start has failed, so greedy jumps to the next possible start.

choices.label: Keep the same start anyway
choices.feedback: Not this one. A negative tank proves the current start cannot finish this section.

narration: That reset rule removes many bad starting stations at once, which is why the greedy solution stays fast.
callout: The next station becomes the new useful candidate.
